one_line_summary: Wired a visible TDD mode shell, but the core flow is mostly mocked and poorly integrated.
strengths: ADR exists and describes phases, roles, and alternatives
CLI/REPL surface area was updated for a tdd plan mode
No git commit or push; changes remain in the working tree
weaknesses: Core implementation is not real: tests are mocked, tools are bypassed, and flow does not actually execute edits/tests
Test suite is weak/brittle and misses the required end-to-end stub-provider coverage in the final files
Docs are incomplete/inconsistent: ADR promises a wiki page that was not added, and some help/runner changes look broken
